title: dblp-mcp: A Model Context Protocol Server for the DBLP Computer Science Bibliography
author: Rodrigo-Ginés, Francisco-Javier
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: We present  dblp-mcp , an open-source Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that exposes the DBLP computer-science bibliography to language-model agents. DBLP is the de-facto canonical CS bibliography: every major conference and journal is indexed, and authors are disambiguated by hand by the DBLP team rather than by heuristics. The server provides seven tools across publication, author, and venue search, plus full author-page extraction via DBLP's XML feed. We validate the server against a real high-volume CS researcher (1,232 publications). The package is available as  pip install dblp-mcp  at  github.com/OpenCodice-Research/dblp-mcp . OpenCódice Technical Report OC-TR-2026-010.
